item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses opening another access-control channel as the default next step, recognizes the repeated pattern across the prior repair/device/venue routing patches, and moves the action upstream to unified intake/blockage attribution across rules, permissions, capacity, system failure, and ownership. It does not provide a usable new channel, queue, entrance, or processing-port implementation."}
